TAX DEED NO. 2024COTD005006 FILED December 23, 2024 TAKE NOTICE County of Cook Date Premises Sold: May 12, 2022 Certificate No. 20-0000154 & 20-0000155 Sold for General Taxes of 2020 Sold for Special Assessment of [municipality and special assessment no.] None Warrant No. [Not Applicable] Installment No. [Not Applicable] THIS PROPERTY HAS BEEN SOLD FOR DELINQUENT TAXES Property Iocated at: 1250 Indiana Ave- nue & 580 East 13th Street, Chicago Heights, IL 60411 Legal Description or Property Index No. 32-22-104-001-0000  and  32-22-104-002-0000 This notice is to advise you that the above property has been sold for delinquent taxes and that the period of redemption from the sale will expire on May 7, 2025. The amount to redeem is subject to increase at 6 month intervals from the date of sale and may be further increased if the purchaser at the tax sale or his or her assignee pays any subsequently accruing taxes or special assessments to redeem the property from subsequent forfeitures or tax sales. Check with the county clerk as to the exact amount you owe before redeeming. This notice is also to advise you that a petition has been filed for a tax deed which will transfer title and the right to possession of this property if redemption is not made on or before May 7, 2025. This matter is set for hearing in the Circuit Court of Cook County, Room 1704, (Calendar 8) Richard J. Da- ley Center, 50 West Washington Street, Chicago, linois 60602, on May 14, 2024, at 9:30 AM You may be present at this hearing, but your right to redeem will already have expired at that time. YOU ARE URGED TO REDEEM IMMEDIATELY TO PREVENT LOSS OF PROPERTY Redemption can be made at any time on or before May 7, 2025, by applying to the County Clerk of Cook Coun- ty, Ilinois at the Ooffice of the County Clerk in ChicagO, Illinois FOR FURTHER INFORMATION, CONTACT THE COUNTY CLERK ADDRESS: 118 North Clark Street, Room 434, Chicago, llinois 60602 TELEPHONE: 312-603-5645 By: Purchaser or Assignee LANDEX TAX LLC Dated: December 23, 2024 1/7, 1/8, 1/9/20257745253 TO: Johana Lopez, Jose Sotelo; Shari Boss, Maria Medina, Ana Gutierez, Paulina Carbajal, Cirilda Gutierez, Gerardo Bravo, Brandon Renteria; Occupant, 194 West 27th Place, South Chicago Heights, IL; Parties in occupancy and posses- sion; any unknown owners and occupants.
